parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  source_id,
  platform,
  source_url,
  raw_title,
  raw_text,
  raw_payload_json,
  language_hint,
  city_guess,
  country_code,
  entity_guess,
  status,
  error_message,
  created_at
FROM raw_ingest_items
WHERE status IN ('PENDING', 'REVIEW')
  AND COALESCE(country_code, 'DE') = 'DE'
  AND (
    entity_guess IS NULL
    OR entity_guess IN ('EVENT', 'event')
  )
  AND source_url IS NOT NULL
  AND source_url <> ''
  AND source_url !~* '(eventim|ticketmaster|getgo|reservix|adticket|koelticket)'
  AND NOT (
    source_url ~* '^https?://[^/]+/?$'
    AND raw_text ~* '(kontakt|impressum|satzung|vorstand|spende|geschäftsstelle|ueber uns|über uns)'
  )
  AND NOT (
    raw_title ~* '(tickets|termine|veranstaltungen|events|activities)'
    AND (
      source_url ~* '(eventim|eventbrite|adticket|getgo|koelnticket|instagram\.com)'
      OR source_url ~* '/(eventsd|veranstaltungen|artist|/d/)/'
    )
  )
ORDER BY created_at ASC
LIMIT 100;

UPDATE raw_ingest_items
SET status = CASE
    WHEN '{{ ($json.resultType || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' = 'created' THEN 'PROCESSED'
    WHEN '{{ ($json.resultType || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' = 'duplicate' THEN 'PROCESSED'
    ELSE 'REVIEW'
  END,
  error_message = CASE
    WHEN '{{ ($json.resultType || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' = 'duplicate' THEN 'DUPLICATE_EVENT'
    WHEN '{{ ($json.resultType || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}' = 'error' THEN 'INGEST_ERROR'
    ELSE NULL
  END,
  processed_at = NOW(),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.raw_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id, status, error_message, processed_at;

UPDATE raw_ingest_items
SET status = 'REVIEW',
    error_message = '{{ ($json.review_reason || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    processed_at = NOW(),
    updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = '{{ ($json.raw_id || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
RETURNING id, status, error_message, processed_at;

SELECT id, raw_title, source_url, status, error_message, processed_at
FROM raw_ingest_items
WHERE status = 'REVIEW'
ORDER BY processed_at DESC NULLS LAST, created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ title: $json.title, description: $json.description, startsAt: $json.startsAt, venueName: $json.venueName, citySlug: $json.citySlug, sourceCategory: $json.sourceCategory, sourceUrl: $json.sourceUrl, raw_id: $json.raw_id }) }}
